review_text: Not your everyday Mexican joint.  There is actual cuisine on the menu.  I recommend Langostinos, molcajete, and fajipina.
Pretty authentic Mexican food in a place like Chelsea
Very good food. Fast courteous service. I will be back.
Good food. Service was great.
Very good food
Amazing food and service!
Our second visit was much better than the first shortly after they opened. My seafood quesadillas were very tasty and large enough that one of the two came home with me.
Took over a half hour to a simple beer. Food here was different than the ones in jackson. Waiter never asked if we wanted drinks refilled after spending an hour and a half in the restaurant.
Awesome food.. friendly and great staff.. come here every week we love it
Food was okay and the restaurants wasn't​ clean.
Food was cold still after they remade my meal
It took forever to be seated, with the lobby EMPTY! The food took forever, and it was cold. I was there on a ​business lunch, just embarrassing!

This was my third visit. The first two visits were not great.But I was willing to give them one more chance, since my daughter who graduated really wanted to go to this restaurant. We had invited guests and had a table of 8. When we first sat down we let them know that we all wanted water immediately because we had just spend 2 plus hour in a hot gymnasium. It took over 15 minutes to get the water. Then it took forever to get our drink order. When the food FINALLY came I had guacamole smeared all over the bottom of my plate it was a mess and got all over the table and my hands. By the time I got a napkin to wipe it up most everyone was done eating except one of our guests because they kept forgetting to bring him silverware. Food quality was substandard. My daughter wanted to order dessert to celebrate her graduation and another guest had to get up to locate any wait staff. The excuse was that she was waiting on a large party. We were ALSO a large party. The service we received was horrible. Will not be back ever. Had to give one star to be posted...
Great food, quick service  for lunch.

The staff here are very friendly. I love the food and it is a huge improvement since the last Mexican restaurant we had in town. If you go I would suggest getting the gauc. and the rice. They  have very reasonable prices and Monday is taco day!!!!!!!!

I've come here multiple times, and every time I've been greeted with a smiling face. The chimichanga is to die for, and the manager made sure everything was going well. Overall a very nice experience.
Nobody likes having to search for their waitress and wait more than ten minutes for the bill. :/

Food was great. Authentic Mexican restaurant.
Nice food good staff great managers
Good food for a decent price
Pretty good food.

Had a party of 11 and had great service. Food was very good. Great restaurant.
Great staff, willing to customize your order and they made sure we got what we ordered. Fast and friendly with many optional choices of food. 5 stars is an understatement
Food was very bland. Even the salsa. I love Mexican food but this just wasn't right. Would never go back there. Taco Bell might be a better choice.

review_text:
Absolutely terrible dining experience.

A friend and I went here tonight and it was and all around bad time. To be fair, it was very busy, but service was extremely slow.

I ordered nachos and my friend ordered burrito al carbón. When we finally got our meals, after about 45 minutes, long after our sodas and salsa had run dry, it seemed like our food had been waiting out as long as we had.

Everything was room-temperature; not a good look for refried beans. And my friend's steak was so thoroughly charred and overcooked that I thought that perhaps "al carbón" meant carbonized.

I let the wait staff know about the poor cooking and they offered a 20% discount. That's why this is a 2 star and not a one star review.

Update: I discovered that my bank account was overdrawn by a small amount and checked my recent charges. Turns out that the 15% tip I left here was, er, augmented to 27%. Unfortunately, Google Reviews does not allow 0 or negative star reviews.
owner_response: Hello M, we are really sorry for what happened. It is possible that you contact us at marketing@l3amigos.com. Thank you

review_text: Good food, we had a large group.

review_text:
I will start this review by saying I have been to this establishment about 5 times. The food is decent, probably a 3 out of 5. 5 being the most amazing food ever... So 3 being average.

Every time I have been here, it has been with my wife, generally dressed in nicer clothing, long sleeves.

Tonight, before I made my hour commute from work back home to Chelsea, I called ahead to double check the closing time. The friendly voice told me 10pm. I arrived at 8pm. "table for 1 please" the hostess grabbed a menu, and started to walk me to a table. A gentlemen came out from behind the bar, and made a strange hand gestures, similar to a baseball umpire. He told her "no!" - and she then said to me "I guess we are not seating anyone right now"

Tonight, I was wearing under armour basketball shorts, and a tank top. (embroidered edges with a pocket) I am clean, wearing nice shoes, a fancy watch, and freshly sprayed cologne. I am also 5ft 11, tattooed, have a beard (well manicured every 7 days by a barber) and weigh 230lbs mostly lean mass. (I body build)

Tonight, I was profiled, and refused a table. This is upsetting to me. I left, went next door to Smokehouse 52, where I was greated with a smile, and promptly sat down, and ate the best pork chops I've ever had in my 32 years of life.

I will never visit Los Tres Amigos again. If you check my review history, I travel often and make it a point to leave POSITIVE reviews every where I go. This business is new to our city. I wish them no ill will, but I sincerely hope they see this review, and learn from this experience.

review_text: I picked my Dad up for lunch today and he requested Mexican food so we headed over to Los Tres Amigos in Chelsea. We were greeted by a very friendly hostess who also became our server. The chips and salsa for the table arrived quickly and the chips were crisp and warm and the salsa was very fresh with a little heat but not too much. My Dad ordered the fajita burrito and I ordered a grilled steak quesadilla. The food was delicious! Our wonderful server brought my Dad a lemonade to go towards the end of the meal after he remarked to her how much he was enjoying the lemonade he had ordered with his meal. Overall, this is a really nice place to eat, the service was very good and we plan to go back soon!
owner_response: Thank you for the recommendation

review_text: We generally have dinner here every few weeks but last night we were told by the manager to never come back!! Ordered a margarita and it arrived with a long dark hair in it - so long it wrapped around the inside of the margarita and hung out the glass. I noticed it immediately and asked for a new margarita. Not sure how the server didn’t see the hair as she brought the drink to our table. Our dinner was not up to par but they were busy. Our server brought the check and my husband said to me “they didn’t charge for your first margarita” - I said “good - they shouldn’t, as good will - we are good customers coming here several times a month. The server then returned and said “I’m sorry, your bill is wrong - I didn’t charge you for the first margarita”. I said “that is the right thing to do - there was a long hair in it”. She said “I will have to go talk to my manager”. A man immediately came our table and said “you drank the new margarita, so you have to pay for it”. We told him that as good will, it should be comped. He got very defensive and argumentative and said “you drank the new margarita and you have to pay for it”. I said “how do I know the server didn’t just pull the hair out of the drink”. He got very upset and said “you pay for nothing” took the bill, walked away saying “and don’t ever come back”!!!! We were shocked by the manager’s attitude and behavior. Then the waitress came back and said “that was a new drink - I did not just pull the hair out of it”. So much for customer service and appreciation at a local restaurant!!
owner_response: We are really sorry about the inconvenience on your service we are passing this information to management

review_text: Went to this restaurant Saturday night for dinner.  On the entrance door is a large sign promoting Shrimp Fajitas for $14.99.  My wife and I both ordered this dinner. When the waitress brought the bill, we were charged quite a bit more. When we questioned the higher charge she said she would fix it.  She returned with the manager to state that this special was good on “Friday’s only”.  No place on the special did it state that.  The manager refused to honor the special.  Terrible customer service in a bait and switch effort.   They lost two loyal customers!

review_text:
We have been to four different locations and never had a complaint with food quality, the atmosphere is welcoming and unique.  Staff shortage have made service difficult.
It seemed as if everyone was pitching in to keep things moving.  I did see one group come in wait a while than leave.  I also saw some people pick up to go orders. As I looked around I really enjoyed the design. The images seemed to give the feeling of old Mexico. Even understanding the trials of staffing, that is what kept them from getting five stars. It would not however keep me from many more visits.

review_text: This was my first time to eat here. I liked the ambience of the restaurant. The waitress was friendly and helpful. For me, the food was middle of the road in matters of flavor. If I am in the area of Los Tres Amigos I will certainly visit again.
owner_response: Thank you for your review

review_text: Los Tres Amigos is a beautiful restaurant!  The atmosphere inside is beautiful, inviting, relaxing, and intimate!  The booths are designed in a way that makes you feel very private!  The bright colors, paintings, and decorations are festive and vibrant, but the lighting is suttle and perfect for romance OR business!  The staff were friendly and efficient. The flavors of the food were good, but not powerful enough to make a huge impact. Most of the staff are of Hispanic descent, so they know what Mexican food should be, but the food didn't delight and wow me as really authentic Mexican food. Lunch portions are appropriately sized, but they weren't very generous with the salsa. Would I eat there again? Absolutely!!!!  Would I drive 20 miles out of my way to eat there?  No.

review_text: Love coming to this place with my family. The staff are kind and attentive. The environment is colorfully eye-catching and comfortable. Will always come back to this place.

Edit - 5/1/23
Update: Ordered shredded chicken tacos and a burrito and got our shredded chicken!

Order was spot on, steak burrito, sauce on the side, order of guac. First time visiting and would definitely return. The only reason I did not give 5 stars, too much sour cream and burrito was only warm.
Waitress was on a phone call on the speaker entire time we were there. Cheese sauce which is usually good had a burnt after taste like bottom of pot was burnt and they served the not burnt part.

We had a bad experience for dinner one evening regarding several price add-on’s and items missing from our order. We attempted dinner this evening a second time with our toddler and waited 20+ minutes without being greeted or waited on. Our family will not be back.

Wont return, terrible service and just okay food nothing special. We have been a few times as it is near home, tonight was the last time. Drive a few more miles and go somewhere better for your money.

Great Strawberry Margaritas! Queso dip is our favorite with chips also!

Maybe I hit a bad day. My food arrived cold or kinda warm but not hot . I was pretty hungry and pressed for time this day. I ate most of the burrito. When the server showed back up after I was done eating… she asked how was everything?  I told her it was cold.. She laughed  and said “ BUT YOU ATE IT”. The food being served cold was not her fault. But her dismissive attitude towards the situation was just flat out disrespectful. I see many good reviews on here. Maybe a bad day for the kitchen..? But a server with an attitude like that will ruin a place like this.
Love this place.
Food was great! We did take out and we were missing a dinner but when we went back to pick it up they told us no charge.
Love this place, the food is great.
We love going here for our Mexican Food Fix. We can honestly say we've never had a bad meal here and highly recommend. We've eaten quite a bit from their menu and the salsa is pretty good as well.

Just left there, and had bad service, and food. Our food was watery inside, said something to waitress about it, and she had no comment back about it just kept making change for our bill. Shouldn't have left any tip but we did. Will never go back there ever
Very poor service,my food was terrible and wet and runny.unfriendy waitress.will not be back.not worth the money.
Always good food at a great price
Good Food Nice restaurant very good service
Can't go wrong with this place. Immersive decor, delicious food and great service.
Fantastic Mexican cuisine!  ❤️
They charged $3 for a side of hot salsa without mentioning it would be extra. Also overcharged the lunch special I got by $2.

Second time I've been here. The first was good and I was really impressed by the huge choice of menu and drink selections. Everything was good. The second time, not so much. I ordered a full-sized Botona (steak and chicken) and was served the absolute skimpiest botona I've laid eyes on.  Barely any steak, barely any chicken, and barely any cheese. I felt like I was eating chips, lettuce, onion, and olives. It wasn't until the very end that I discovered that there was refried beans on in - just a tiny scattered amount. All in all, I felt I wasted almost $14 and I'm skeptical about giving them another try.
Burrito was good. Fast and friendly service.

In the past, I have had nothing but good food and good service, but this past Friday was the worst.

My girlfriend and I went to dinner on  night.  We immediately were seated by an extremely nice hostess and told our waitress would be with us soon.  However we sat for 15 minutes before we were greater by our waitress (they were not busy, not crowded or anything).

My girlfriend and I wanted to get some drinks with our meal, and we are 22 (younger looking) but the waitress was sarcastic and reluctant to even give us a drink menu.  She wouldn’t let us see it until we showed her IDs.  After that was over, we looked over everything and decided what to order.  I ordered my drink and they were out of melon liqueur due to the supply chain issues.  That’s common everywhere and no problem!! But, I ordered three more drinks before I had to give up hope since they didn’t have pineapple juice or anything for drinks.  Instead our waitress suggested a drink with jaegar… I don’t know why since that is the complete opposite of what I was going for with the first three drinks.

Then, we finally got our chips, but weren’t given any bowls or anything to actually eat out of.  When we asked our waitress we didn’t get bowls for another 5-10 minutes.

The food was good, and I wouldn’t be against getting it again, just the service…

When we were done eating sort of (we were still eating and had a togo order placed) our waitress came to the table and told us we could pay right now electronically.  We hadn’t even received our other order, or the extra chips that never came.  And when I asked for a paper receipt she acted snark and annoyed.

Eventually while we were still finishing up eating and had some of our drinks left she came to our table and wanted to take our waters and clear our table.

It wasn’t for another 20 minutes I got up and had to ask for our togo order that she had forgot to get for us.

Once we had our food and I was ready to pay, our waitress was standing over me and the card reader as I paid and selected a tip.  Not a great feeling, and I regret selecting as generous of a tip as I did.

Update: 2 weeks later 9-10-22
They had more help, food was a bit faster, but I have to say the service was actually a bit worse. Just depends on the server. Still wonderful mexican food.

Great mexican food! They had a severe lack of employees, but they have not lost the quality, and we still enjoyed it.
We were a little worried when the line was out the door, but it worked out, and everyone was working hard.
Food was good. Atmosphere was laid back.
Slow to even acknowledge us at the door. Then slow to seat and we also sat a long time before anyone coming to us at the table. Servers seemed overworked and not interested. Food was good.
Birria tacos were the best we've had.   Not  greasy.   Napoles tacos were very delicious as well.

Los Tres Amigos is now our favorite place to go for Mexican food.
I love the vibrant colors in the decor.
The food is very good.
Although staffing is low, the wait staff were very hardworking, and didn't miss a beat.

The food was good, as were the drinks. Their "Happy hour" board was a bit misleading as it displayed different times that what we were told by the wait staff, but eve so not a deal breaker. The staff were very friendly and interacted with our group well. This had not been our original destination when we set out for dinner, but we are happy it ended up being so. Typical Mexican fair, if you're in the area, check it out

The food was overall good but my enchilada
dinner was cold when served, which is likely the fault of the kitchen. They didn’t seem that busy but kind of inefficient and slow. The waitress needed more training…. she forgot our water, made multiple trips to the table without bringing all requested items & didn’t take empty platters with her, which made her job unnecessarily harder. We filled up on the chips and salsa while waiting. She also didn’t check with us after the food is served until too late. The margarita was good.
We had to ask a waitress to get our waitress she must have forgot we were there

Average Mexican food restaurant with all the typical cuisine. The waitress was okay but you could tell she was stressed. Could be a management attitude affecting why they can't hire or keep staffed. Putting large typed notices all over the place about being short staffed and raising prices doesn't help the dining experience at all. I recommend they evaluate the management and remove all those signs immediately.
My friends and I had a great nite here. The entire staff were so friendly, and our server Becka was amazing. The food and margaritas were excellent.

VERY DISAPPOINTED WITH THEIR MANAGER!  My wife and I went there for dinner and we ordered two margaritas.  After drinking about 30% of my margarita I noticed a crack in the glass from one side of the rim to the other, while licking salt from the rim.  When the waitress came back, I ordered a second drink for my wife and asked that mine be replaced due to the broken glass.  When she came back, they had poured the remainder of my old drink into an new glass!!!  After dinner, we asked why they didn't just get me a new drink and she asked her manager.  He said that because there wasn't a "chip" in the glass, they wouldn't replace it!!   I was shocked to hear the manager's response and have decided not to eat there again!

SO MUCH FOR GETTING BACK TO ME WITH A RESOLUTION!  BEEN OVER A WEEK AND NO ONE  LEFT A MESSAGE.  OBVIOUSLY THEY WRITE A "SINCERE" APPOLOGY TO MAKE THEM LOOK BETTER TO THE PUBLIC, BUT DON'T REALLY CARE WHAT THE CUSTOMERS THINK!
Great margarita and food choices!

Service was poor. Waitress never delivered our complete food order. When I asked her about it  she went to the kitchen to see if it was ready she never returned. When she brought the bill I again asked her why she didn't complete our food order.
Then she went to the manager and he subtracted $4 from our bill.
No explanation on how our order was so poorly managed. Will be very reluctant to go there again for dinner
Long wait but food is good
Great food
It was the worst dining out experience we had. Food was worse the opening a can. Couldn't eat it. Service wasn't bad but it definitely left quite a bit to be desired.
Great lunch with large beverages

Well, nothing lasts forever.  Management has let this place slide right into the tank.  Way too slow service.  Not kept up inside.  Jessus is still there and still awesome, and the food is sort of ok, but this place has dropped off our list of preferred and frquented.  Removed 2 stars...

7 yrs ago:  Awesome food, great staff, and fast service.  We couldn't wait for them to open in Chelsea and now they're close by.

This was the worst Mexican meal of my life. Who waters down refried beans? Who advertises two chicken breasts on a plate only to find out it’s one chicken breast sliced to about a quarter inch thick, they probably get 2 meals out of a single breast. The food is terrible. The service is mediocre due to being short staffed but somethings wrong with management when they water down refried beans to where they’re not even edible. Avoid this ridiculous chain restaurant. Go to the A&W it’s 100 times better. Very disappointed! Save your money, save your soul!!

Atmosphere was great, service was great! We ordered the Carnitas dinner. We were really hoping for it to be fantastic. We’ve heard good things about this place. The pork was not good. It needed to be fried. The rice was tasteless. And the corn tortillas were stuck together and couldn’t separate them. We were bummed. I wanted to love this place. The salsa needs some help🤦‍♀️

Great food and fantastic service. A nice selection of vegetarian and vegan options. The waitress was friendly and very helpful with any questions we had. Their flavored lemonade is so good! We had the elote appetizer which was tasty.

This location is really hit or miss for good service. Frequently when my wife and I have dined here, we have been forgotten by our servers while larger parties get frequent attention. Often we have to wait for long periods of time with little or no acknowledgement from the staff. Food has come out cold and don't often get refills on drinks. The food is good, but I'd rather drive farther away to one of the Jackson locations to get my Los Tres fix!
We go to all the locations, and love the food !
Would not make any adjustments to  menu.  Very inconsiderate.  Hard vs soft taco with meal.  Really?  We left & won't be back.
Yummy food and drinks large portions!
The service was fine but the food was awful

Solid food!  And cute inside. The only thing I’ve ever been disappointed with here have been tacos. The steak and chicken entrees have been very good - and this is coming from someone who worked in Little Village in Chicago for years. And my wife is a big enchiladas snob and she loved hers tonight. It’s an asset to have this place in Chelsea.

Extremely slow service. Ordered a queso appetizer and it came with no chips. By the time chips arrived at the table (30 minutes later) the queso was disgusting. Tasted spoiled. Same with the queso on the meal. Not even edible. Will not return.

Worst food I have ever paid for. The waitress got angry when I said fajita instead of steak, and typically if you see a coustomer took 1 bite and pushed the plate to the side a good watress inquires why. the beef tasted like it was cooked a week ago and re heated. The chicken fajita made me sick to my stomach. Refried beans tasted like caned catfood smells.
We always have exceptional service here — and fast too. They do a great job of accommodating our toddler which makes dining easier!

When walking in there was a very strong smell of cologne  so strong you could not smell the food cooking. As we went to our table the smell got stronger. Napkins left on the table were overwhelming strong with this scent. After a few mi uses we figured out it wasn't cologne it was their cleaner. Out food tasted like it. We could not take o e single breath without smell g and tasting it out clothes smelled like it and We coughed all night..coughi g the smell. DO NOT GO HERE  .. it could be dangerous if you have breathing issues.
Great service.   Great meal
Great lunch!
Definitely a must do within Chelsea! I had the tilapia fish tacos and do not recommend. Bad taste and seems like the fish came from a farm. Otherwise a great restaurant.
Always a good meal!
They were very busy but, we got excellent service!!
First time at the Chelsea location.  We prefer Jackson 😌

We visited for the first time for dinner on a Saturday night. There was no wait and we were seated immediately in a beautifully decorated and private booth. The waiter came immediately with chips and salsa and took our drink orders. We ordered a side of guacamole and it was good - seasoned well with chunky tomatoes, onion and cilantro. We ordered and our food was out in less than 10 minutes! I got a burrito with lettuce, tomato, sour cream and guacamole on top with rice and beans on the side. It was a huge plate and I could only eat half of it. It was very good and I took the rest home for the next day. My husband got a burrito and enchilada and enjoyed his as well.
Best restaurant experience Ive had.
The service is always quick, good food, and good times.
Excellent service and food. Great family oriented atmosphere.
Server was very polite. Took a little bit of time to get food but the food was amazing definitely one of the good Los tres

Great food I frequent the place often and still will but the last two times we have ordered for the office they only include one bag of chips for 15 and 17 lunch orders.  Even ordered queso and the rude lady in the front said no additional chips could be provided even though we spent over $165 on our last order

Best Hispanic food in Chelsea. Margaritas are good and the service is very good and friendly.  Botanas had fresh vegetables and grilled chicken, versus frozen/thawed vegetables and boiled/shredded chicken found in many less expensive Hispanic venues.

Service was slow at first, took a while to get our drinks. Food was good but came out wrong (soft shells vs hard shells) and they didn't offer to correct it, just apologized. This won't stop us from going back.
Always a great meal here. Love the birria tacos and the queso rice!

I would give this place atleast a three star for food quality but when you come into a resturant with your family and order off menu with one price and get your bill and its a different price . Only to be told prices changed in April of 2022 but the menus have not been updated , sign on wall says nothing about April 2022 so customer could think April that is coming up . I was told that resturant writes in menu with black magic Marker and we got menus that had been cleaned .....ok right . I have been in the food industry for 33 years as a chef and this practice as a buisness is absolutely ridiculous.  I went to this resturant on a regular basis as I am Townie and live within walking distance . I will not step foot in that place unless the owner would like to make it right . I felt the Manager /waitress was rude and condescending and this type of place does not belong in our town . I will be taking my buisness for Mexican cuisin to the new resturant coming to Saline / or food truck at the amazing ugly dog distillery.

Update : what a joke of an establishment.  No responce ....nothing . I will now tell everyone I know that they should not spend money at this place .
Do Better los tres owner smh

I have to uodate my review for this establishment,  I did not go for 8 months and finally decided to go back and give another shot . I must say my experience was so good ...The young lady who was our waitress was awesome , the menu's have been updated and new items added , the chips warm and the food was warm and delicious.  I am very impressed with the turn around and am excited to try again soon .

I had only had take out here. That was shortly after they opened. I really enjoyed dining in. Their menu surprised me with both vegetarian and vegan options! I tried the plant based dish tacos and it was super good! The service was great!
Very flavorful
Great service very clean dining area.
My enchilada dish was not fully heated when served.  For this reason I am hesitant to return
Quesabirria tacos will change your life

They claim “authentic” but it is a very white washed chain attempt at trying to fake it. I’ve never had tacos I couldn’t finish before today. Figured I’d play it safe and just got hard with ground beef. The shells were basically just Ortega or similar out of the box. The meat though was the killer, It was clearly undercooked and tasted horrible. &they only offered one type of salsa that tasted like sweetened tomato paste
Very delicious food! I ordered the quesabirria. I have ordered this many times at the Jackson locations, but the consume at this one was even more rich and flavorful  than usual!
Hali (hope that's the correct spelling) was an awesome server and we had a great time talking about comets and several other topics!!!
Amazing
This was my first time visiting this restaurant but it won't be my last. The food was very good and the atmosphere was great.

Only thing really wrong  with the service is the young man stood there waiting to see how much I would tip him
I tip in cash most the time and tip between 15-20% normally but was under 15% this day.

Solid Mexican food, friendly service.  The menu prices are outdated in some cases.  The bill I received was about $6 over what the menu suggested things would cost. I brought this up to the waiter and it was eventually fixed.

Within our party of five there was one that wanted double rice. Her portion of rice was no bigger than any one else's. Another thought she was to get beans with her meal. The waiter said her selection didn't include it. Beans and rice are not going to bankrupt this restaurant. The waiter should have provided them and worked the tip. Beans and rice. Word of mouth is so powerful. Happy patrons increase more business. Beans and rice?? Mere pennies I speculate even in these financially tuff times. Also we were not asked if we wanted more chips and salsa or refills on our drinks.
Even though we were there about 90mins before closing, they welcomed us and did not rush us at all.  Our waitress was perfectly friendly, and the food was as good as always.
Good prices, good food. Food was plated like in a fancy restaurant. Service was fast. The "we are short staffed" signs were a little tacky and kind of killed the mood.
Friendly staff and amazing food. Definitely stop in if you get a chance

Stood in the foyer for 15 minutes before someone asked me if I needed a table or if I was there for pick up.

When I asked for assistance I was told that they are “very busy”. The place wasn’t even half full of people.

My order took 30 minutes longer than their estimate.

I will not return.
Love it!!!!
Great Mexican food
Really poor service.

Arrived at noon, not greeted   or sat for about 5 mins. Finally sat. (3 other tables there) Took about 10 mins for someone to even come over and take our food and drink order . Took another 15 mins to get our margaritas. My friends cup was dirty it had red specks in her drink. 70 mins after being sat our order came and mine was completely wrong. I ordered a fajita bowl with no refried beans. I got a fajita burrito with refried beans. The waitress was acting like nothing was wrong and all of this was complexly normal. Told the manger we each drank 1/3 of our drinks and that’s comp for everything. We walked out . Wish there was negative stars. 70 mins at noon with only three other tables being occupied is just too much …  wasn’t about to wait another 15-20 mins for my correct dish .

Oh also asked for hot salsa with our chips and salsa . That finally came after we ate two bowls of chips …
Not exactly the avocado I was expecting today. Food usually looks like it's straight out of a food magazine. Overall taste is great and portions are descent.

The atmosphere is beautiful and inviting. The staff, however, were not. Food was fine, as to be expected of a chain Mexican restaurant, and probably would have been better had it been served fresh. If I could give zero stars based on the experience with staff alone, I would. Service was slow but we remained patient as we noticed signs posted requesting patience due to being extremely short staffed, though there were plenty of staff but they were preoccupied on their phones or socializing with one another. The worst part of our experience was when our waiter provided the handheld POS to check out, stood over me and told me to skip the survey (after I watched him give himself a thumbs up on it from my friend’s transaction), and then proceeded to snatch the handheld away from me and throw my card at the table and walk away, because I did not press skip, rather attempted to complete the survey to provide feedback. I was absolutely stunned and needless to say, would NEVER return to this establishment again.
Had a wonderful lunch after riding DTE trails. Will be going again. Both my girlfriend and I are connoisseurs of Mexican food and this place is legit.
Had a nice lunch outside.
Very good tacos, margaritas are pretty good, and chips and salsa are above average, don't hesitate to go here
Best texmex in the area.!
Excellent good, great service, cozy atmosphere. Best Mexican/Tex-Mex I’ve had since living in Texas.
One of my favorite restaurants! Delicious

Went here on a Sunday for dinner. Service was very quick and we enjoyed our food (steak burrito, veggie fajitas, queso). There are a lot of options on the menu to meet a variety of dietary preferences. Would go again!

We got tucked away all the way back corner of the restaurant and the lady kept saying she was going to get our stuff get get stuff get our stuff and it took forever it was one of the worst experiences I've ever had los tres Amigos .
Great staff, food is delicious
Nice place
Trash of a place honestly. Stuff is extremely rude. Food is literally always wrong, messed up or had a hair in it. Make your food at home cause it’s not worth it here.

reviewer_name: Holly Davey, BA RBT CMHP QMHP QIDP

review_text: Immediate seating on a Saturday night👍🏻.  Fast service and good food👍🏻. Very friendly staff!
Great Staff and Fast Service
The food is very good. No long waits. Customer service was excellent. I would definetely recommend.

Waited 15 minutes before anyone even acknowledged we were waiting. They walked right past us and didn't say a word. Finally sat us at a table and the seats were greasy with chips all over them and the tables were sticky. We turned around and walked out.

So disappointed! We used to love coming here! The food used to be amazing. When I got my enchiladas, the insides were cold. And I don't mean like Luke warm. Actually cold! And when I told them, they microwaved them and that just made them taste even more off. My sons cheese on the quesadilla wasn't even melted. I don't think we'll ever be back.
The food was great, but the service was bullshit.

If you like typical Midwestern Mexican dishes, this place will not disappoint.  Be careful. The service is a little spotty. Sometimes they seem understaffed ticket times for the kitchen seem to be a little longer compared to other Mexican eateries. But overall, if you're looking for just a cozy little place to spend some time with friends, you're not in a rush and you're more focused on the socialization aspect than the food. This is the place for you.
Great service, attentive staff, short wait time for food, wonderful food, great prices, would recommend this place to anyone
I would like more slices of steak in the fijitas and less onion . The steak pieces are very small. But most do that now days 🤷
Great food and staff

I had a 5.00 coupon which they refused to honor and were very nasty about it.
I'm a regular customer but will not be back as the attitude ruined the entire experience over 5.00.
There are many other restaurants in chelsea that appreciate your business..
Management is very sadd.....
Very nice dinning experience.  Good food, good service and very good margaritas.
Nuff said
I live 45 minutes away and am a first time patron and i really like this place. Tacos al Pastor are super bomb. I will bring my family next time I am in the area!
Best Mexican food we had so far in Michigan. Was a little hard to find at first, it's inside a bigger building.
Customer service horrible, very rude . They never get my order right I ask them to fix it and there very argumentstive
Thank you Ruben!
Love this place.  Food was delicious and service was average time even with them being short staffed.
Great lunch specials. It started to get busy when I came in and the server had many tables, but he did not forget about us. Food was great 👍 👌
Good food and drinks.
Tasty with friendly service.
Very sweet waiter , very good

Had high hopes… chips and salsa very good however my boyfriend ordered the fajitas and doesn’t like peppers so he said meat and onions only. I should have took a picture of the two whole onions they cut up and threw on the plate with a couple chunks of meat. We asked our server for a little more meat and she said it would be an extra charge. She said she’s afraid of the cook and didn’t want to ask. (Which is horrible and no one should be afraid of anything at work)
My order wasn’t anything to write home about either. Service was ok we had to ask two other servers for things and ours passed us 3 or 4 times without asking how things were. We went during weekday at a slow time.
Poor service, slow to attend to you and a waitress in a bad mood
Very slow service. The food was ok. I had better at outer places.
Very good food and very friendly staff.
Great food and service.
Restaurant chain with americanized Mexican food. It was just OK.
My friend and I went to see a play today and had lunch before it started. Our food was amazing! The best burrito Maya! Thank you
Great food and great service!!
Poor food, poor service, go somewhere else.

I come to Los Tres every week to meet friends. Jesus is usually our server He is kind, respectful and always makes our visit fun and a wonderful experience. The food is always well prepared and served in a timely manner. We are greeted and seated promptly and are welcomed with a smile. We feel valued and appreciated as customers and always look forward to our “Los Tres” night.
Always an amazing meal and great service! Jesus is a fabulous server, remembering our orders, serving us quickly and efficiently!
Food was not hot and hardly any chicken in my taco.

We went to this location and recently, prior to this, one of their Jackson locations. We really enjoyed our vegan fish tacos and are so grateful for having vegan options. The chips and salsa are amazing, as well as the service. Our server, Teagan was a great, so attentive and friendly.
Good veggie options
Food was delicious!
Our server was great! The food was amazing and atmosphere was very chill bust courteous!
I wish I could curse to properly express how gosh darn good this food was.

Today my husband and I went to Los Tres Amigos. I ordered the taco salad bowl with a side of rice and he ordered a chimichanga. To our surprise the food was like warm. We told the waitress and also said we don’t want to waist the food but wanted to let you know. She said she would let her manager know. She finally came back and said her manager has been on the phone. I asked her for the bill, paid it and left. Very disappointed.
Excellent food! Reasonably priced. Good service.  Even though they ran out of Chile rellenos.  Very authentic.  Wish they had restaurants close to my area. Highly recommended!
We are so glad to have this option for Mexican food. Delicious menu choices and wonderful staff.
I asked the waiter to bring me some water and more chips and salsa for our table and he brought nothing.
One of the few places that has vegan food. I eat at Los Tres all the time for that reason. I appreciate serving plant based customers this way.

This is a nice place with great service. We would prefer more traditional Mexican food, but its decent. It can be loud but at least that distracts from the majority of the TVs being tuned to Fox stations.
Loved our lunch.  It’s good Mexican, not always easy to find.  Great salsa in particular.  Everything was temp hot and spices were good.  Very flavorful.
I pretty much come here exclusively for the Birria Tacos and they never disappoint!
My favorite place to get tacos in the area! Always fast and friendly service!
Easily the most bland, boring, and disappointing Mexican food we've ever had. I went with a group of 5, and all of us mentioned how disappointing it was the next time we were together.
Good food, good service, friendly atmosphere and a place for a nice dinner out with friends or family.
Authentic Mexican food. Fast and friendly service. Colorful decorations reminiscent of old-world Mexico.

I called at 9:38 for two tacos. He said the kitchen is closed. You can’t place an order. I said what time does the kitchen close for next time? He says 940 haha Go elsewhere where they actually care

I appreciate your prompt response as an owner so I changed my review. The gentleman on Tuesday night was rude and short. I understand wanting to close the kitchen, but two tacos that are already cooked. I don’t think it would’ve disrupted that much. And the whole goal is to sell food so thank you for your response
The food was exceptional. I had chicken chimichangas and it was fresh, and was very tasty. The rice was incredible. If I'm in the area again I would definitely go back again. Very impressed.
Perfect as always! Great price and food. The only Mexican restaurant we go to and never any issues.

Do not order online or for pick up. They WILL mess up your order or give you the wrong order and then will NOT give any compensation.  Way over priced IMO for the quality and horrible customer service.
Typical Mexican restaurant.
Excellent service
great margs and very good food, service is quick, and price is reasonable, love this place a lot
Yummmmmmmy

We had a really disappointing experience and won't be coming back. The watermelon mojito was overly sweet with blackened mint and wasn't muddled. The chicken taco tasted metallic like it came from a can and was dripping wet. We ordered a combo that was supposed to come with a burrito but got a cold enchilada with sauce tasting like outbof a jar instead. The chalupa and chips tasted like they were fried in old oil and were inedible. We order a flan to share (before the food arrived) and. we were glad to hear that wasn't available, given how bad everything else was. On top of all this, they charged us an extra $2.00 for the steak taco when the menu said it was only a $0.75 upcharge. We didn't make a scene over the overcharge and still left a 20% tip since it's not the server's fault the kitchen can't cook properly, but we're definitely never going back. This place needs to seriously fix their food quality and their oil because everything tasted bad.
Will come back, we enjoyed

Came the first time and didn’t like it. Thought maybe just a bad day. Came a second time and it still didn’t taste good. Stale chips and the ground beef tasted like dog food. My son got the kids meal and his fries were hard and looked similar to those you buy at meijer. I want to support a local business, maybe I’ll get again if the food improves or chef changes idk.

Fast, friendly and great food...everytime.

Keith has been our server many times.  Always pleasant and attentive.
I am in here almost every week because I work close by. It's always great service and good food. I get the traditional chicken tacos and they are consistently very good.
Karla was WONDERFUL! I love lunch at Los Tres Amigos-- best deal in town!
This restaurant has affordable luch options and the quality of food provided is wonderful! Thak you to Alexia for excellent service!! Do not hesitate to stop in for a meal.
My co worker and I went there for lunch. We both said it was deelishioso! Ok, it was just me to say that😅

Let's start this off by saying im a hard working person i went there with a friend I got nachos and for the money I paid you gave me a bunch of chips and a pile of sour cream and 2 whole slices of tamato I could of made better nachos drunk with velveeta cheese who ever made those nachos should never be in the kitchen so I gave you my hard earned money and now eating a lunch meat sandwich man I appreciate ya oh did I mention there was no meat and no cheese come on you dont care about paying customers to feed me that garbage
